Custom Replacement Banners for Trade Show & Business Display Applications

Update your retractable banner stands with professionally printed replacement banners designed for trade shows, business displays, and marketing presentations. Our replacement banners are printed on high-quality materials and engineered to work seamlessly with your existing retractor hardware.

Perfect for businesses that need to refresh their messaging, update branding, or create seasonal displays without purchasing new banner stand hardware. Each replacement banner is custom printed to your specifications and designed for easy installation in your retractable stand.

Available in multiple sizes to fit standard retractor dimensions, with both vinyl and fabric material options to match your display environment and presentation needs.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Replacement Banner Material for Durable Retractable Stand Use

Vinyl Replacement Banner Printing

Vinyl replacements are printed on high quality 13oz or 14oz scrim material. The scrim vinyl features a woven fiber inside the material that gives the banner extra strength for repeated retraction and extension in trade show and business environments.

All vinyl replacements are digitally printed in full color with vibrant, professional-quality results suitable for business presentations and marketing displays.

Fabric Replacement Material

Our Banner Soft material provides a fabric option for banner stands. The material offers a matte finish with vibrant print colors ideal for indoor business displays and professional presentations.

The edges of the fabric will be cut with a hot knife to prevent fraying when rolled in and out of the retractor. We recommend careful handling when retracting the banner as some fraying may still occur over time.

Vinyl Replacement Banner Sizes

Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex. A 5 ft banner could finish with a 2.5 inch variance).

If your banner size needs to be precise for specific retractor hardware, please contact a Customer Service Representative to discuss your specific application.

Request a sample packet of materials

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Finishing for Replacement Banner Installation

All replacement banners are finished with precision cutting and professional edge treatment to ensure proper fit and function in your retractable banner stand hardware.

Vinyl replacement banners receive clean, straight cuts with reinforced edges where the banner attaches to your retractor mechanism. This ensures smooth operation and prevents tearing during setup and takedown.

Fabric replacement banners are finished with hot knife cutting to seal edges and prevent fraying during use. The sealed edges maintain a professional appearance throughout the life of your display banner.

Each replacement banner is inspected for print quality, edge finishing, and proper dimensions before shipping to ensure it will function correctly with your existing retractable stand hardware.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Production Times for Custom Replacement Banners

We provide flexible production time ranges for replacement banners to meet your trade show and business display deadlines. Choose from one to five business days based on your timeline needs.

1 Business Day Priority

Rush production for urgent trade show and business presentation needs.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete

2 Business Days Express

Fast turnaround for time-sensitive replacement banner needs.

  • Ideal for upcoming events and presentations
  • Quality control and precision finishing maintained

3 Business Days Standard

Our most popular production timeline with no additional rush charges.

  • Free standard production time
  • Suitable for most replacement banner projects

5 Business Days Saver

Cost-saving option for replacement banners when timing allows.

  • Same quality materials and printing
  • Reduced pricing for extended timeline

Note: Production time does not include shipping time. Turnaround starts from approved artwork or proof approval.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Replacement Banner Payment & Ordering Options

All replacement banners must be paid for prior to production to ensure timely completion of your order.

Accepted Payment Methods

  • Visa, MasterCard, American Express and Discover cards
  • Business checks (must be received before production begins)
  • Purchase orders (contact customer service for approval)

Order Processing

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your proof for your replacement banner order. This ensures you are completely satisfied with the design before production begins.

Minimum order requirement is $35.00 in product value.

For purchase order processing or payment questions, please contact a customer service representative at 320-391-5300.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Replacement Banner Delivery

Replacement banners are produced in our Minnesota or Las Vegas facilities, whichever provides the best service based on your location and order specifications.

Available Shipping Methods

  • Economy (5-10 Business Days)
  • Standard (3-5 Business Days)
  • Three Day (3 Business Days)
  • Two Day (2 Business Days)
  • Overnight (1 Business Day)
  • Freight (for large orders)

We offer 1-3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States. Shipping prices are determined by package weight and destination.

Tracking & Delivery

You will receive a tracking number once your replacement banner has shipped. All shipping company terms and conditions apply for delivery once packages leave our facilities.

International Shipping

For international shipments, customers must provide shipping labels and customs documentation. We accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS only.

For shipping questions or international orders, contact customer service at 320-391-5300 before placing your order.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Trade Show & Business Applications for Replacement Banners

Replacement banners provide cost-effective solutions for updating your retractable banner stands across multiple business and marketing applications.

Trade Show Applications

  • Update booth displays for different events and audiences
  • Seasonal messaging and promotional campaigns
  • Product launches and new service announcements
  • Brand refresh without replacing hardware

Business Display Uses

  • Retail store promotions and seasonal displays
  • Office lobby and reception area messaging
  • Conference and presentation backdrops
  • Sales meeting and training materials

Marketing & Promotional Applications

  • Event sponsorship displays
  • Grand opening and special event signage
  • Job fair and recruitment displays
  • Product demonstration backdrops

Perfect for businesses that already own retractable banner stand hardware and need fresh, updated messaging for different campaigns, seasons, or events.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Replacement Banner Printing

Professional Artwork Guidelines

For best printing results, submit artwork as .eps files converted to outline. We also accept high resolution .pdf, .tif, and .jpg formats at 300 dpi or higher resolution.

If you are unsure of your file quality, our professional graphic designers can assist with artwork preparation for optimal printing results.

Order Proofs for Banner Replacements

Proof requests allow you to review your replacement banner design, order details, pricing, and shipping information before production begins.

Your order proof will include a low-resolution preview of your artwork and complete order summary. We will not send your order into production until you provide approval.

Color Match Proof System

For color-critical replacement banner projects, we recommend our Color Match Proof System to ensure accurate color reproduction that matches your brand standards.

Contact a customer service representative for details about color matching for your specific replacement banner project.

Design Assistance

Our team of graphic designers can create custom replacement banner designs based on your specifications, brand guidelines, and messaging requirements.

For artwork questions or design assistance, contact customer service at (320) 391-5300.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Replacement Banners for Your Retractable Displays Today

Ready to update your retractable banner stands with fresh, professional replacement banners? Choose from three convenient ordering options to get started:

Template Customization

Browse our professional template library and customize backgrounds, clipart, text, and graphics using our online design tool. Perfect for quick updates and standard business messaging.

File Upload

Submit your print-ready artwork files for professional printing. Ideal when you have specific designs or brand materials prepared by your marketing team.

Professional Design Service

Work with our graphic design team to create custom replacement banners tailored to your business needs, brand standards, and marketing objectives.

Each replacement banner is professionally printed and finished for seamless installation in your existing retractable banner stand hardware. Update your displays without the cost of new equipment.

Note: This product includes ONLY the replacement banner. No hardware is included.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Replacement Banner Questions & Answers

What retractable banner stands do these replacement banners fit?

Our replacement banners are designed to fit standard retractable banner stand dimensions. Common sizes include 78" x 24", 78" x 31", 78" x 33", 78" x 36", 78" x 47", 79" x 31", and 116" x 47". If you need a custom size, contact customer service for availability.

How do I install a replacement banner in my retractable stand?

Installation instructions vary by retractor model. Most replacement banners attach to the top and bottom rails of your existing hardware. We provide general installation guidance, but refer to your retractor manufacturer's instructions for specific steps.

Can I get an exact size match for my existing banner?

Vinyl materials may have up to 1/2 inch variance per linear foot due to temperature sensitivity during printing and finishing. If precise sizing is critical for your application, discuss requirements with customer service before ordering.

What's the difference between vinyl and fabric replacement banners?

Vinyl replacement banners are more durable and suitable for repeated use, while fabric banners offer a premium matte finish ideal for professional presentations. Fabric banners require more careful handling to prevent edge fraying.

Do you offer proofs before printing replacement banners?

Yes, you can request order proofs to review your design, specifications, and order details before production begins. We will not proceed with printing until you approve your proof.

Can you match specific colors for my replacement banner?

Our Color Match Proof System provides the most accurate color matching for brand-critical projects. Contact customer service to discuss color matching requirements for your replacement banner.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
